claims.summary: Cadence clarity needs numeric grounding in addition to a textual basis.
claims.disposition: Verified: cadence_clarity_score is numeric and derives from exact jitter classes; cadence_clarity_basis states the evidence boundary.

claims.summary: Typed presence with an absent hybrid delta could become a ghost coherence state.
claims.disposition: Verified safe: typed-only, malformed legacy, and non-finite paired data receive explicit unavailable states and no numeric coherence/delta.

claims.summary: Inter-arrival variance and hybrid-delta edge cases need direct tests.
claims.disposition: Verified by normal/late/stale/no-history cadence boundaries and finite/non-finite/malformed hybrid regressions.

claims.summary: Replace the compatibility basis string with a new controlling schema type.
claims.disposition: No behavior change is needed: the additive numeric score and typed states already answer the diagnostic concern while preserving wire compatibility.
